title: Logging and Monitoring
description: Implement structured logging and monitor application health.

slides.title: Why Logging Matters ЁЯУЛ
slides.content:
# Observability

In production, you need to know what your app is doing. Logs help with debugging, auditing, and monitoring.

Avoid `console.log` in production тАУ use a proper logging library that supports log levels, structured output (JSON), and transports (file, network).

slides.title: Winston тАУ A Popular Logger ЁЯУЭ
Morgan for HTTP Logs ЁЯМР
slides.content:
Morgan is an HTTP request logger middleware for Express.

```bash
npm install morgan
```

```javascript
const morgan = require('morgan');
const express = require('express');
const app = express();

app.use(morgan('combined')); // Apache combined format
```

Combine with Winston by creating a custom stream.

slides.title: Monitoring and Alerting ЁЯЪи

quizData.question: Which npm package is commonly used for HTTP request logging in Express?
quizData.explanation: Morgan is specifically for HTTP request logging.
